title: benzoin megaphyllum
intro: Benzoin megaphyllum, also known as Sumatran benzoin, is a plant species belonging to the family Styracaceae. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of benzoin megaphyllum include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of benzoin megaphyllum include resin extracts, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
